ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date on which the game is scheduled */,
  "schedule_season" INTEGER /* Season of the game (year) */,
  "schedule_week" INTEGER /* Week of the season the game occurs in */,
  "schedule_playoff" INTEGER /* Indicator if the game is a playoff game */,
  "team_home_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "team_home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "team_away_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "team_away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game is played */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "game_length_minutes" INTEGER /* Length of the game in minutes */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_away_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_away_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_home_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_home_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division where the team plays */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference where the team is categorized */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Head coach of the team */,
  "home_stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home stadium of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., grass, turf) */,
  "grass_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the grass (e.g., good, bad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the weather record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "wind_mph" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage */,
  "weather_detail" TEXT /* Additional weather details */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_lines" (
  "betting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting line entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the betting line */,
  "team_favorite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the favorite team */,
  "spread_favorite" REAL /* Point spread for the favorite team */,
  "over_under_line" REAL /* Over/under line for the game */,
  "money_line_favorite" REAL /* Money line odds for the favorite team */,
  "money_line_underdog" REAL /* Money line odds for the underdog team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("betting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_lines_team_favorite_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_favorite_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_lines_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game data */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the game data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the statistic */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the team */,
  "pass_yards" INTEGER /* Pass yards gained by the team */,
  "rush_yards" INTEGER /* Rush yards gained by the team */,
  "total_tds" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns scored by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the penalty */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the penalty */,
  "penalty_type" TEXT /* Type of penalty (e.g., holding, offsides) */,
  "penalty_yards" INTEGER /* Yards penalized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the injury */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the injury */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, postseason) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)
